message:
audit: deep mutex.rs audit (1451L SOUND) — cancel-safety, FIFO, poisoning verified

Deep audit: src/sync/mutex.rs (1451 lines) — SOUND. Verified cancel-safety
of LockFuture (waiter removed on drop with next-wake cascade), FIFO fairness
(try_lock respects waiter queue), memory ordering (Acquire/Release on poison
flag, parking_lot mutex for state), guard drop with panic poisoning, and all
edge cases. 30+ comprehensive tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
